case_title: LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS AT LAKE MERCED VS ABRAMOV, NATALLY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT ABRAMOV, NATALLY ABRAMOV, BORIS NON APPEARANCE OF PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-17-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-08-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 PARTIES SETTLED. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON 2/8/02, THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED TO 8/23/02 AT 10AM. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON 8/23/02, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,150.00 FILED BY LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS AT LAKE MERCED AS TO DEFENDANT ABRAMOV, NATALLY ABRAMOV, BORIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
